name: rikyu
description: Interact with the RIKEN AI4S supercomputer: submit and monitor Slurm jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the official AI4S documentation.

interface.shortDescription: Submit and monitor AI4S Slurm jobs and search AI4S docs.
interface.longDescription: Interact with the RIKEN AI4S supercomputer from Codex: submit and monitor GPU-first Slurm jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in AI4S documentation index.
defaultPrompt: Submit a small AI4S GPU test job.
